summary: Both restoreassist + restoreassist-sandbox stuck for days on Prisma P3009 — every prod deploy errored
context: Sandbox-prod hadn't shipped in 6 days; production hadn't shipped in 11h. Prisma migrate deploy failed silently with P3009 (one rolled-back migration blocks all subsequent ones). /api/health stayed green because DB was reachable — the schema was just drifted. UptimeRobot saw no problem.
lesson: DB reachability is necessary-but-not-sufficient for prod health. Need a separate /health/migrations endpoint that flags _prisma_migrations drift, AND a Vercel deploy-failure watchdog that catches consecutive ERROR builds.
